caption: In a trade show setting, a bald man with a grey beard wearing a grey polo shirt presents a small, metallic cubic object. Initially, the scene focuses on a close-up of the man's hand holding the tiny cube. As the perspective widens, the man is shown holding the object and a small piece of paper while standing in front of a booth. He is positioned near a display board that reads "ZB38 AlphaSzenzor Inc." and features a logo for "ALPHASZENZOR" along with a section titled "Typical Gas Sensor Attributes." To his side, another man wearing glasses and a light-colored button-down shirt appears. In the background, a black sign for "Collaghan Innovation" and "microMaker3D" is visible, along with another booth marker that reads "ZB39 D." The sequence transitions from a detailed view of the product to a medium shot of the two men interacting in the professional exhibit space.
